_comment: 역할 초상화 동물화(수인) v5 - 일본 전통 회화 스타일. 우키요에 목판화 + 니혼가 안료 + 조주기가 의인화 동물 전통 + 우타가와 쿠니요시 요괴 풍. docs/역할 동물화 비주얼 제안서.md 참고.
style_prefix: Traditional Japanese painting style, ukiyo-e woodblock print aesthetic combined with nihonga mineral-pigment refinement, in the spirit of Utagawa Kuniyoshi yokai cat prints and the Choju-giga anthropomorphic animal scroll tradition, Hyakki Yagyo Emaki yokai scroll influence, bold sumi ink outlines, flat areas of washi paper textured color with gofun white and subtle gold leaf accents, Japanese yokai kemono anthropomorphic character in wafuku Taisho-era kimono or haori attire, character portrait at medium distance (head-and-shoulders composition), camera angle and facing direction varies per character (three-quarter view, profile, looking aside, tilted head — not all facing front), species-specific animal head anatomy, expressive eyes natural to the species, traditional Japanese circular mon-style cartouche frame with karakusa scroll vines and sakura petals,
style_suffix: , traditional Japanese ink and color on aged washi paper texture, sumi brush lines, restrained traditional palette of indigo sumi-black vermilion ochre moss-green gofun-white with sparse gold leaf, moonlit nihonga atmosphere, masterpiece, best quality
